title:
DIRECTIVE (EU) 2024/1226 OF THE EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL
of 24 April 2024
on the definition of criminal offences and penalties for the violation of Union restrictive measures and amending Directive (EU) 2018/1673
text:
DIRECTIVE (EU) 2024/1226 OF THE EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL
of 24 April 2024
